title: How to find the maximum value that meets a condition (MAX IF)
task: Get the largest number in a range, but only for rows that match a criterion.
explanation: MAXIFS returns the maximum of B2:B5 restricted to the rows where A2:A5 equals 'North'. Those values are 10, 30 and 20, so the result is 30 - the South row's 50 is ignored. Use MINIFS the same way for a conditional minimum.
